# Fusion Creations

> Custom 3D printed ID card holders and badge holders for businesses. UK-based, run by Rhys.

## What We Do

Fusion Creations makes bespoke 3D printed ID card holders and badge holders for companies. Every holder is fully customisable with company colours, logos, and individual employee names. We use durable PLA and PETG plastics and deliver across the UK.

## Key Facts

- UK-based small business
- Orders from 50 to 5,000+ units
- Turnaround: 1-2 weeks for small orders, 4-6 weeks for large orders
- Materials: PLA and PETG plastic, including translucent and textured finishes
- Fully custom: colours, logos, employee names on every unit
- No tooling costs unlike injection moulding
- Clients include American Express, ClearScore, and DriveScore

## Use Cases

- Employee ID badge holders
- Visitor pass holders
- Event and conference badge holders
- Onboarding welcome pack items
- Security access card holders
- Branded company merchandise

## Contact

- Website: https://fusion-creations.com

- Online 3D designer: https://fusion-creations.com/#designer
